entries.source: Checks that keep the learning honest

Children below the age of 13 are encouraged to use the app, but under adult supervision. However, we do not knowingly collect or process any Personal Information from children under the age of 13 and hereby specifically prohibit any user under the age of 13 from providing us with any personal information without parental consent. If you are a parent of a child under 13 years of age and you believe your child has provided us with Personal Information, we will take necessary actions and notify you if necessary. There is no fixed timeline for the necessary action as it depends on the volume of queries we handle and our available workforce.
entries.value: ከ13 ዓመት በታች ያሉ ልጆች መተግበሪያውን እንዲጠቀሙ ይበረታታሉ፣ ግን በአዋቂ ቁጥጥር ሥር። ነገር ግን፣ ከ13 ዓመት በታች ካሉ ልጆች ማንኛውንም የግል መረጃ በማወቅ አንሰበስብም ወይም አናስኬድም፣ እና ከ13 ዓመት በታች ያለ ማንኛውም ተጠቃሚ ያለ ወላጅ ፈቃድ ለእኛ ማንኛውንም የግል መረጃ እንዳይሰጥ በግልጽ እንከለክላለን። ከ13 ዓመት በታች ያለ ልጅ ወላጅ ከሆኑ እና ልጅዎ የግል መረጃ ሰጥቶናል ብለው ካመኑ፣ አስፈላጊ እርምጃዎችን እንወስዳለን እና ካስፈለገ እናሳውቅዎታለን። አስፈላጊው እርምጃ ቋሚ የጊዜ መርሐግብር የለውም፣ ምክንያቱም በምንይዛቸው ጥያቄዎች ብዛት እና ባለን የሰው ኃይል ላይ ይመረኮዛል።

entries.source: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building

Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Understand code, debug errors, learn concepts, and build small projects step by step.
entries.value: በመገንባት ፕሮግራሚንግን ለመማር Code Tutor ኤአይን ለመማር ለመጠቀም የተተኮረ መንገድ ነው፣ ተገብሮ መልሶችን ለመሰብሰብ አይደለም። ሁነታው በተወሰነ ሥራ ዙሪያ የተገነባ ነው፦ ኮድን ይረዱ፣ ስህተቶችን ያርሙ፣ ጽንሰ-ሐሳቦችን ይማሩ፣ እና ትንሽ ፕሮጀክቶችን ደረጃ በደረጃ ይገንቡ።

entries.source: Collaborative Instruction AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.

entries.source: Creative Brainstormer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Brainstorm projects, stories, designs, titles, experiments, and unexpected angles.
entries.value: Creative Brainstormer AI Learning Mode ኤአይን ለመማር ለመጠቀም የተተኮረ መንገድ ነው፣ ተገብሮ መልሶችን ለመሰብሰብ አይደለም። ሁነታው በተወሰነ ሥራ ዙሪያ የተገነባ ነው፦ ፕሮጀክቶች፣ ታሪኮች፣ ንድፎች፣ ርዕሶች፣ ሙከራዎች እና ያልተጠበቁ አቅጣጫዎች ላይ ሐሳብ ያፍልቁ።

entries.source: Curiosity, practice, and AI that teaches.
Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: ስለማንኛውም ነገር ለማወቅ ጉጉ ነዎት? ይጠይቁ፣ ያስሱ እና በራስዎ ፍጥነት በጥልቀት ይሂዱ። ጓደኛዎ ሃሳቦችን ተግባራዊ፣ የማይረሱ እና ለመገንባት ቀላል ያደርጋቸዋል። ይሞክሩት፡ "የአክሲዮን ገበያ በእርግጥ እንዴት እንደሚሰራ አብራራ።"
